title: Panivorous
description: Adds some delicious "foods" to hit videogame Minecraft.
body:
**Panivorous** is a mod that adds nine delicious "food" items of varying quality for you to enjoy. Eight are obtainable through the Creative menu or crafting, one is unobtainable without commands. Two of the foods double as blocks, and one non-food block is available.

![Modded food items obtainable through the Creative menu or by crafting. In order, the listings include a glass shard, a bowl of glass, a strange purple and black slop, a reddish mass, a PNG of someone's face, a weirdly coloured granite block, a block of sugar, and a block of the face from before.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f58cdeccf52ca747b40ca1361d6b2d15caf23b2d.png)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler - THE SUPER COOL SECRET "FOOD"</summary>

![The fabled "Blue Bread", obtainable only via commands. It has a tooltip that says "IS THAT BREAD WHAT WOW THAT'S SO CRAZY I CAN'T BELIEVE IT'S BLUE", followed by garbled text. It restores four full hunger shanks and 2 full saturation shanks.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c6d0fdfc66b355ce20fa4fd2964dbb98bdd4b02.png)
This is where the mod name comes from. Feast and find out what it does.

</details>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/1CM3zRq9tFc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

_Please enjoy my complementary, intentionally bad video showcase of the various foods included in the mod._
